scripts.deploy:hosting: npm run build && npx firebase-tools deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy:function:hourlyIndexer: npm run build:functions && npx firebase-tools deploy --only functions:nostr-web-pulse:hourlyIndexer
scripts.deploy:function:seedFirestore: npm run build:functions && npx firebase-tools deploy --only functions:nostr-web-pulse:seedFirestore
scripts.deploy:function:seedByPubkey: npm run build:functions && npx firebase-tools deploy --only functions:nostr-web-pulse:seedByPubkey
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run deploy:function:hourlyIndexer && npm run deploy:function:seedFirestore && npm run deploy:function:seedByPubkey
